description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on one side, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front yard features a driveway with a parked car, concrete stepping stones, and two mature trees, one near the entrance and another in the yard. The landscaping is simple, with green grass covering most of the lot and a paved path leading to the main entryway. The house appears to have a private backyard area, partially enclosed by the building's L-shaped footprint. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a functional, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and minimalist landscaping featuring a driveway, stepping stones, and two trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked car, main entry path with stepping stones, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, white exterior walls, and the arrangement of the trees and driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private backyard area, flat roof, and the L-shaped building layout.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side of the driveway, emphasizing the large windows, green lawn, and entry path.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat path of concrete stepping stones, no porch or overhang, and a simple door design.
